subject: [RFC PATCH 07/45] mm: page_alloc: async evacuation of stolen movable pageblocks

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch introduces a lightweight asynchronous evacuation mechanism to prevent memory fragmentation caused by movable pageblocks being stolen for unmovable or reclaimable allocations. When a movable pageblock is claimed, it queues a work item to migrate the remaining movable pages out, allowing future unmovable/reclaimable allocations to be satisfied from the now-evacuated block. This approach reduces long-term memory fragmentation and keeps allocation types concentrated.
